pred_reason: SWC-101 is appropriate as the contract contains the inherent ERC-20 approve race condition vulnerability. This is a known design flaw in the ERC-20 standard itself, not an implementation error, but still requires documentation. Evidence: Finding 8 confirms the presence of the ERC-20 approve race condition; This is a standard vulnerability pattern in ERC-20 tokens (SWC-101); The contract inherits this vulnerability despite correct implementation of other functions
